headline: Exploring the top movers within the S&P500 index during today's session.
summary: Wondering what's happening in today's session for the S&P500 index? Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Thursday.

headline: Here’s Why McKesson Corporation (MCK) Slid in Q2
summary: Janus Henderson Investors, an investment management company, released its second-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Global Sustainable Equity Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Global equities experienced a robust quarter, with the Fund returning 16.17%, outperforming the Index’s 13.16% gain and the Peer Group’s 12.98% return. An overweight in information technology, particularly AI […]

headline: Cheniere Energy (LNG) Appoints Britt Vitalone As It Reworks Key Credit Lines
summary: Cheniere Energy (NYSE:LNG) has appointed Britt Vitalone, a veteran finance leader with experience at McKesson and Align Technology, to its Board of Directors. Vitalone will serve on both the Audit and Compensation Committees, adding expertise in corporate finance, capital allocation, and governance. The company has also adjusted several revolving credit facilities, including higher commitments, extended maturities, and updated terms for subsidiary credit lines. These governance and credit...
